name: librarian-mcp
description: The Librarian — MCP knowledge server for Liana Banyan Platform

scripts.rebuild: tsc && node dist/indexer/buildIndex.js --incremental && node scripts/codegen-canonical-hook.mjs && node scripts/verify-canonical.mjs && node scripts/render-knight-queue.mjs && node scripts/pheromone-bloodhound.mjs
scripts.rebuild:full: tsc && node dist/indexer/buildIndex.js && node scripts/codegen-canonical-hook.mjs && node scripts/verify-canonical.mjs && node scripts/render-knight-queue.mjs && node scripts/pheromone-bloodhound.mjs
scripts.rebuild:incremental: tsc && node dist/indexer/buildIndex.js --incremental && node scripts/codegen-canonical-hook.mjs && node scripts/verify-canonical.mjs && node scripts/render-knight-queue.mjs && node scripts/pheromone-bloodhound.mjs
scripts.test: tsc && node --test tests/test_registry.mjs tests/test_fates_router.mjs tests/test_scribe_tools.mjs tests/test_consult_scribes_latency.mjs tests/test_member_cathedral.mjs tests/test_cathedral_export_import.mjs tests/test_build_gate.mjs tests/test_supervisor.mjs && node --test tests/test_update_session_guard.mjs && node --test tests/test_canonical_verify.mjs && node --test tests/test_canonical_codegen.mjs && node --test tests/test_knight_cathedral.mjs && node --test tests/test_auto_extract.mjs && node --test tests/test_pheromone.mjs && node --test tests/test_session_id_regex.mjs tests/test_scribe_id_suggestions.mjs && node --test tests/test_iron_tablet.mjs && node --test tests/test_shadow_iron_egiant.mjs && node --test tests/test_in_concert.mjs && node --test tests/test_perplexity_gateway.mjs && node tests/test_iron_tablet_metrics.mjs && node tests/test_bouncer_scales_judge.mjs
